lead_entrances.name: Quick Repair Request / 快捷报修
lead_entrances.success_message_en: Thank you. Your repair request has been received. Our NANOFIX team will review it shortly and contact you as soon as possible.
lead_entrances.success_message_zh: 谢谢您，您的报修请求已提交成功。NANOFIX 团队会尽快查看，并尽快与您联系。

lead_entrances.name: Customer Registration + Repair / 注册会员并提交报修
lead_entrances.success_message_en: Welcome to NANOFIX. Your account and repair request have been created successfully. Our team will review your request shortly, and you can track the progress from your customer portal.
lead_entrances.success_message_zh: 欢迎加入 NANOFIX，您的会员账户和报修请求已创建成功。我们的团队会尽快查看您的请求，您也可以在客户中心追踪处理进度。
success_next_step_buttons: View Customer Portal / 查看客户中心
Submit Another Request / 再次提交报修

workflow: Job / Work Execution / 工单 / 现场施工
Warranty / Claim / 保修 / 保修申请
